title: YTPMV: SPY KILLER
description:
I was bored when I made this.. I know it sucks e_e'
yet, I'm very addicted to Castlevania... It's great! The soundtrack is amazing and the gameplay is top notch, the graphics are amazing and it's hard... REALLY HARD, but that what I think is nice in the game :3
The music is from Castlevania Dawn of sorrow, for the Nintendo DS, I was going to use the original, but this one is nice as well x3
